methodology_notes: Commands from the skill's SKILL.md were executed manually by the evaluator, NOT by a separate agent instance.

assertions.description: Both a before and after screenshot file were committed for the affected dashboard
assertions.evidence: Files before-copilot-adopt.png (66034 bytes) and after-copilot-adopt.png (66086 bytes) were created locally. The git commit step was NOT executed.

assertions.description: The before screenshot was taken before changes and the after screenshot after changes
assertions.evidence: Commands were run in sequence, but no actual dashboard change was made between screenshots.

assertions.description: Screenshot file names clearly distinguish before vs after
assertions.evidence: Files named before-copilot-adopt.png and after-copilot-adopt.png per the skill's naming convention.

assertions.description: Screenshots are taken of Grafana at http://localhost:3004 with panels fully loaded
assertions.evidence: Screenshots were taken from a real Grafana instance. Visual inspection was not performed.

notes: Manual command execution. No actual dashboard changes were applied between before/after screenshots.
